---
title: "AI Agents in Economics and Business Research"
subtitle: "Day 1 - Building AI Agents"
author: "Tinbergen Institute"
format:
  revealjs:
    footer: "Tinbergen Institute | Day 1"
---

## {.center}

::: {.r-fit-text}
Build reliable habits before speed.
:::

## Day 1 structure

- Six blocks, 60 minutes each
- 20 lecture, 30 hands-on, 10 debrief
- One micro artifact per block

## Storyline

- Start with core concepts
- Practice with constrained tasks
- End with safe operating habits

## Blocks 1-3 (morning)

- B1 Intro
- B2 LLMs and AI Agents (E1)
- B3 Context (E2)

## Blocks 4-6 (afternoon)

- B4 Tools 1 (E3)
- B5 Tools 2
- B6 Memory (E4 adapted)

## Block rhythm slide (repeat pattern)

- Lecture: one core concept
- Hands-on: one group artifact
- Debrief: one pitfall and fix

## Media placeholders (day opener)

- [PLACEHOLDER] `slides/assets/media/day1/screenshots/d1_b1_tool_stack_overview_v01.png`
- [PLACEHOLDER] `slides/assets/media/day1/screenshots/d1_b1_repo_layout_v01.png`
- [PLACEHOLDER] `slides/assets/media/day1/videos/d1_b1_prompt_to_submission_v01.mp4`

## Task {.center background-color="black"}

**Exercise flow for Day 1**

- E1 prompt anatomy
- E2 prompt rewrite + rubric
- E3 coding trace, E4 safe paragraph

*Groups of 3. Artifacts submitted per block.*

## Resource anchors in this deck

- Foundations: R031/R032/R033/R034, R004
- Prompting: R005, R030, R048
- Safety: R041/R042, R051, R052, R059, R060

## Transition to block decks

- Each teaching block has its own deck
- This day deck is the narrative spine
- Open block deck at start of each hour

## Block deck links

- `/slides/blocks/day1/day1_block1.html`
- `/slides/blocks/day1/day1_block2.html`
- `/slides/blocks/day1/day1_block3.html`

## Block deck links (cont.)

- `/slides/blocks/day1/day1_block4.html`
- `/slides/blocks/day1/day1_block5.html`
- `/slides/blocks/day1/day1_block6.html`

## Wrap-up

- Concepts -> workflows -> safeguards
- Block artifacts feed day-2 work
- Keep evidence with every claim
